description: Balanced strategic slack across financial workforce operational knowledge network governance ethics and implementation burden.
Prioritizes cash reserves liquidity credit access contingency funding and budget flexibility.
Prioritizes staffing depth recovery time cross-training manageable workload and psychological safety.
Prioritizes backup systems spare parts reserve capacity alternate workflows and operational continuity.
Prioritizes institutional memory documentation mentoring knowledge maps and after-action archives.
Prioritizes suppliers mutual aid partner optionality redundant routes and trusted relationships.
Prioritizes decision rights flexible budgets escalation authority adaptive rules and accountability.
Prioritizes safeguards against shifted burden burnout supplier exploitation community harm hoarding and abandonment.
Penalizes implementation burden when administrative budget political technical or cultural capacity is constrained.
